Course.Title: The Complete Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp
Course.Description: Become a Full-Stack Web Developer with just ONE course. HTML, CSS, Javascript, Node, React, PostgreSQL, Web3 and DApps

Course.Title: MySQL Database Administration: Beginner SQL Database Design
Course.Description: Learn SQL for data analysis, relational database management and administration w/ MySQL Workbench (SQL DBA for beginners!)

Course.Title: Complete Artificial Intelligence and Python Developer Course
Course.Description: Master Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Science, NLP, and Computer Vision by Building Real-World AI Projects

Course.Title: Game Design and Development with Unity Specialization
Course.Description: Break into the video game industry with theoretical, technical, and practical knowledge from one of the world’s best programs.

Course.Title: The Complete Flutter Guide: Build Android, iOS and Web apps
Course.Description: Flutter 2026: Build fast, production-grade apps for Android, iOS and Web with Flutter and Dart

Course.Title: Integrative Programming and Technologies
Course.Description: An online course where you will learn various integration techniques and tools.

Course.Title: Event-Driven Programming
Course.Description: A self-paced, online course where you will explore the event-driven programming paradigm using Java.

Course.Title: Web Systems and Technologiess
Course.Description: An introductory course on web development where you will learn the rudiments of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and XML.

Course.Title: Advanced Database Systems
Course.Description: A self-paced, online course where you will learn the fundamentals of MySQL. At the end of the course, you will create a simple CRUD application.
